current_public_release.immutable_policy: The v0.1.0 document-level data snapshot is immutable except for metadata, documentation, cross-reference, and provenance corrections that do not alter public rows, columns, source hashes, or intended use.

tracks.goal: promote the local member identity review package into a corpus-wide validated derived component with release gates, schemas, manifests, and non-overclaiming docs. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; publication remains blocked pending normalized corpus input and authority coverage review.
tracks.title: Corpus-Wide Member Identity Release

tracks.goal: promote party attribution from local/provenance fixtures into a temporal corpus-wide derived component that depends on validated member identity. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; release remains blocked until corpus-wide member identity exists.
tracks.title: Corpus-Wide Party Attribution Release

tracks.goal: promote speech-turn candidates into a validated derived component only when the candidate artifact and validated member identity are both available. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented and candidate artifact exists (439 turns); release remains blocked pending validated member identity.
tracks.title: Validated Speech-Turn Component Release

tracks.goal: promote sitting/proceeding structures from design fixtures into validated corpus-wide neutral components reconciled to official sitting and proceeding evidence. Repo-side builder/checker and the comparison-ready historical ledger are implemented; release remains blocked until official historical comparison exists.
tracks.title: Sitting And Proceeding Component Release

tracks.goal: implement validated corpus-wide extraction for votes, motions, bills, oral/written questions, answers, and procedural decisions with provenance. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; release remains blocked until validated member identity, party attribution, and sitting/proceeding components exist.
tracks.title: Vote Motion Bill Question Extraction Release

tracks.goal: move ParlaMint-NZ from endpoint contract/sample readiness to a scope-declared public release package with schema validation and maintainer-facing evidence. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; release remains blocked until validated member identity, party attribution, speech-turn, and sitting/proceeding components exist.
tracks.title: ParlaMint-NZ Public Endpoint Release

tracks.goal: move Popolo/Open Civic Data from sample output to a validated public endpoint release. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; release remains blocked pending validated member identity, party attribution, vote/motion extraction, and speech-turn components.
tracks.title: Popolo/Open Civic Data Public Endpoint Release

tracks.goal: move Akoma Ntoso from sample output to a validated public endpoint release with selected profile/schema evidence and source-span preservation. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; release is blocked pending validated member identity, party attribution, speech-turn, motion, and vote components.
tracks.title: Akoma Ntoso Public Endpoint Release

tracks.goal: move CAP/ParlaCAP from sample topic output to a validated public release after topic codebooks, speech/proceeding units, and maintainer expectations are settled. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; release is blocked pending validated speech-turn components and maintainer-confirmed codebook intake.
tracks.title: CAP/ParlaCAP Public Endpoint Release

tracks.goal: move UD/CoNLL-U from sample output to a validated NLP endpoint release with tokenizer/parser pinning, offset fidelity, and scope-declared coverage. Repo-side builder/checker are implemented; release is blocked pending validated speech-turn text and completed Stanza/spaCy comparison evidence.
tracks.title: UD/CoNLL-U Public Endpoint Release

tracks.goal: move RDF/JSON-LD from sample graph output to a validated public linked-data release with SHACL, stable URIs, PROV-O/DCAT/SKOS/W3C Time, and SPARQL examples.
tracks.title: RDF Linked Data Public Endpoint Release

tracks.goal: add the missing DataCite export contract and generated metadata payload so publication packages can target DOI-hosting workflows cleanly.
tracks.title: DataCite Export Contract

tracks.goal: standardize text/source-span selectors across derived components, endpoint annotations, search chunks, RDF links, and NLP outputs.
tracks.title: W3C Web Annotation Selector Contract

tracks.goal: convert maintainer-review package drafts into real upstream submission handoffs only after endpoint release gates pass, with submission and feedback evidence.
tracks.title: Upstream Submission Execution

tracks.goal: add practical Python, R, DuckDB, and SPARQL helper examples for consuming document-level and endpoint artifacts without changing core data semantics.
tracks.title: Researcher Client Helpers

tracks.goal: publish a static documentation surface showing export models, validation status, citation patterns, release ladder state, and endpoint readiness.
tracks.title: Static Documentation Portal

tracks.goal: add non-authoritative entity-linking outputs for people, organisations, places, legislation, ministries, portfolios, and committees with explicit exploratory status.
tracks.title: Entity Linking Exploratory Outputs

tracks.goal: add exploratory embeddings and topic-model outputs with model cards, manifests, optional dependencies, and non-authoritative publication boundaries.
tracks.title: Semantic Search Embeddings And Topic Models

tracks.goal: add validated classifiers for speech acts, question/answer structure, interjections, procedural rulings, and debate segments after speech-turn components mature. Blocked until validated speech-turn components and procedure readiness are available.
tracks.title: Speech-Act And Procedure Classifiers

tracks.goal: add NIF/RDF linguistic annotation views that connect token and sentence annotations to stable selectors once RDF and UD layers mature.
tracks.title: NIF/RDF Linguistic Annotation Views

tracks.goal: model parliamentary periods, sittings, offices, party memberships, and role intervals using W3C Time-compatible structures.
tracks.title: W3C Time Temporal Model

tracks.goal: add an optional terminology/lexicon layer for NZ parliamentary and legal vocabulary if downstream RDF and NLP use cases need it.
tracks.title: OntoLex-Lemon Terminology Layer

tracks.goal: move from supplied-archive coverage auditing to official full historical sitting/proceeding reconciliation before making completeness claims.
tracks.title: Full Historical Sitting Reconciliation

tracks.goal: execute the package/CLI migration plan from corpus-family engineering alignment while preserving existing quality gates and release behaviour.
tracks.title: Package And CLI Migration Execution

tracks.goal: generate Akoma Ntoso-style legislative and parliamentary document structure from validated neutral proceeding components.
tracks.title: Akoma Ntoso Endpoint

tracks.goal: create Comparative Agendas Project and ParlaCAP-compatible topic outputs with codebook provenance and validation.
tracks.title: CAP / ParlaCAP Topic Endpoint

tracks.goal: create validated Universal Dependencies and CoNLL-U linguistic annotation outputs with token-to-source alignment.
tracks.title: Universal Dependencies / CoNLL-U Endpoint

tracks.goal: publish RDF/JSON-LD views with PROV-O, DCAT, SKOS, stable URIs, and SHACL validation.
tracks.title: RDF Linked Data Endpoint

tracks.goal: prepare validation-backed samples, mapping notes, and contribution evidence for ParlaMint/Parla-CLARIN, ParlaCAP/CAP, mySociety-style parser references, and related ecosystems.
tracks.title: Upstream Contribution Packages

tracks.goal: resolve raw `MemberOfParliament` values into authoritative, provenance-backed member identity fields as a derived dataset layer.
tracks.title: Member Identity Resolution

tracks.goal: add provenance-backed party attribution as a temporal derived layer, dependent on validated member identity where needed.
tracks.title: Party Attribution With Provenance

tracks.goal: promote speech-turn candidates to a validated derived artifact or explicitly keep them excluded from published final scope.
tracks.title: Speech-Turn Validated Artifact Decision

tracks.goal: create shared validation tests and manifests for derived member, party, and speech-turn fields before any derived dataset publication.
tracks.title: Derived Fields Validation Manifests

tracks.goal: Integrate open REST API from bills.parliament.nz as an authority source for bill-stage metadata, member sponsors, select committees, and legislation.govt.nz cross-references. 3,513 bills extracted, 351 unique member names.
tracks.title: Bills API Integration

tracks.goal: Extract structured MP name, party, and electorate data from Wikipedia articles for Parliaments 47-53. 249 MPs extracted from Parliaments 52-53.
tracks.title: Wikipedia MP Lists Acquisition

tracks.goal: Acquire 510 full-view NZ Parliamentary Debates volumes (1854-1990) from HathiTrust collection 71329709 via OAuth API.
tracks.title: HathiTrust Hansard Acquisition

tracks.goal: Access Radware-protected NZ Parliament website pages using Playwright stealth browser techniques. All 5 target pages successfully fetched.
tracks.title: Parliament Website Stealth Access

tracks.goal: Cross-reference multiple authority sources (Wikipedia, Wikidata, Bills API, Parliament website, Electoral Commission) to resolve and validate member identity. 51/51 names resolved (100%).
tracks.title: Member Identity Triangulation

tracks.goal: Define dataset ownership boundaries between corpus-nz-hansard, corpus-law-nz (legislation), and planned corpus-nlp (NLP). Documented in docs/cross-repo-dataset-architecture.md.
tracks.title: Cross-Repo Dataset Architecture

tracks.goal: Access historical NZ parliamentary content from NZLII (1854-2008 bills). Currently blocked (HTTP 403). Deferred in favour of HathiTrust.
tracks.title: NZLII Historical Acquisition

tracks.goal: Generated a Popolo/Open Civic Data maintainer-review sample package, mapping notes, validation manifest, checker, and readiness boundary without inferring full voting records from text patterns alone.
tracks.title: Popolo / Open Civic Data Endpoint

tracks.goal: Generated a ParlaMint-NZ maintainer-review TEI sample package, mapping notes, validation manifest, checker, and readiness boundary without making ParlaMint the internal core schema.
tracks.title: ParlaMint-NZ Endpoint

tracks.goal: Defined machine-readable neutral component schemas, stable ID requirements, fixture rows, validation manifest, referential-integrity gates, and publication boundaries.
tracks.title: Neutral Parliamentary Component Model

tracks.goal: Modelled NZ-specific procedure categories, authority-source requirements, boundary fixtures, uncertainty policy, release gates, and endpoint mappings.
tracks.title: NZ Parliamentary Procedure Model

tracks.goal: Kept the base runtime minimal with a validated optional dependency-group policy, endpoint dependency citations, deferred install-check rules, and release-artifact pinning requirements.
tracks.title: Dependency Extras Policy

tracks.goal: Defined stable ID and URI patterns, deterministic examples, namespace guidance, deprecation mapping policy, and endpoint validation gates.
tracks.title: Canonical ID and URI Policy

tracks.goal: Created reviewed evaluation schemas, fixtures, metrics, and gates for member resolution, party attribution, speech turns, votes, and topic coding.
tracks.title: Gold Evaluation Datasets

tracks.goal: Defined document-level, authority-source, neutral-component, endpoint, and upstream-contribution release levels with artifact mappings, manifest fields, publication gates, checker, and docs.
tracks.title: Release Ladder

tracks.goal: Distinguished supplied DocumentsDB extract completeness from full historical NZ Hansard completeness with coverage manifest, report, quality-gate checker, and release/endpoint guardrails.
tracks.title: Historical Coverage Audit

tracks.goal: Identified official-first authority source candidates for members, parties, offices, sittings, bills, motions, votes, and procedure, with manifest schema, reuse/coverage notes, hashes, and downstream unblockers.
tracks.title: Authority Source Discovery

tracks.goal: Recorded the legislation-project engineering baseline and an implementation-ready package/CLI migration plan while preserving Hansard's strict script-workspace quality gate and publication boundaries.
tracks.title: Corpus Family Engineering Alignment

tracks.goal: Harmonised Zenodo rights metadata and completed sandbox draft/upload/update/readback proof for generated metadata packages while preserving the protected production publication gate.
tracks.title: Zenodo Rights Metadata And Zenodraft Workflow

tracks.goal: Generated validated Croissant, RO-Crate, Frictionless, DCAT, and PROV-O metadata packages with checksums, deterministic exporter, and package-specific quality-gate validation. Live Zenodo Sandbox proof remains tracked by `zenodo_rights_metadata_and_zenodraft_workflow_20260609`.
tracks.title: SOTA Metadata Packages

tracks.goal: keep `corpus-nz-hansard` aligned with preferred sibling label `corpus-nz-legislation` across GitHub, Hugging Face, Zenodo, OSF, and future metadata environments.
tracks.title: Corpus Family Naming And Publication Alignment

tracks.goal: Decide whether OSF is unused, a review-bundle host, or an optional mirror with checksums and citation policy.
tracks.title: OSF Optional Mirror Policy

tracks.goal: Define shared core fields and compatibility expectations across legislation and Hansard.
tracks.title: Shared NZ Corpus Core Schema

tracks.goal: Adopt SOTA CI/code-quality automation using Rust-backed tools where possible: uv, ruff, ty, typos, zizmor, taplo, plus actionlint.
tracks.title: SOTA CI/CD Code Quality And Rust Tooling

tracks.goal: Verify and fix any confirmed Hugging Face viewer split/cast or file-layout issue, then add layout regression checks.
tracks.title: Hugging Face Viewer Layout Fix

tracks.goal: Create an evidence ledger for GitHub, Hugging Face, Zenodo, OSF, and future metadata surfaces.
tracks.title: Public Surface Audit Evidence

tracks.goal: Add release evidence ledgers, GitHub artifact attestations or SLSA-style provenance, and signed/checksummed artifact policy.
tracks.title: Artifact Provenance And Attestations

tracks.goal: Implement SemVer/dataset/schema version governance, Release Please-style changelog automation, and consistency checks.
tracks.title: Bleeding Edge Versioning And Release Automation

tracks.goal: hardened the published GitHub and Hugging Face repository surfaces for discoverability, citation, provenance, release posture, and metadata quality after Zenodo DOI publication.
tracks.title: Repository SOTA Hardening

tracks.goal: built a local lexical search and citation-ready chunk index from the normalized Hansard Parquet without external embedding services.
tracks.title: Search and RAG Index MVP

tracks.goal: built conservative document-level speech-turn segmentation tooling and validation outputs without claiming authoritative speaker attribution.
tracks.title: Speech Turn Segmentation MVP

tracks.goal: created local release/versioning artifacts and a review package without uploading or publishing any dataset.
tracks.title: Release Hosting and Versioning

tracks.goal: prepared repo-side public dataset release documentation, provenance, limitations, and release manifest without uploading or publishing.
tracks.title: Public Dataset Readiness

tracks.goal: built the first evidence-backed corpus pipeline from source inventory through schema discovery to manifest, Parquet, and DuckDB outputs.
tracks.title: Hansard Corpus Pipeline MVP

tracks.goal: auxiliary source-inventory track created during Phase 1. Implementation evidence is aligned with `hansard_corpus_pipeline_mvp_20260602` Phase 1.
tracks.title: Source Inventory Verification and Manifest Generation

tracks.goal: Establish multi-git and multi-archive mirroring setup to prevent single-point-of-failure repository/dataset takedowns.
tracks.title: Multi-Git and Multi-Archive Mirroring Setup
